text: No passenger vehicle shall be operated on any highway with any load carried thereon extending beyond the line of the fenders on its left side or more than six inches beyond the line of the fenders on its right side.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 15. SIZE, WEIGHT, AND LOAD [35000 - 35796]
### Chapter 2. Width [35100 - 35111]
##### § 35111

No passenger vehicle shall be operated on any highway with any load carried thereon extending beyond the line of the fenders on its left side or more than six inches beyond the line of the fenders on its right side.

*(Amended by Stats. 1961, Ch. 120.)*

subsections.text: No passenger vehicle shall be operated on any highway with any load carried thereon extending beyond the line of the fenders on its left side or more than six inches beyond the line of the fenders on its right side.
